proof:
set avg := cellAverage2 u0 u1
have hsum : (u0 - avg) + (u1 - avg) = 0 := p0Projection2_residual_mean_zero u0 u1
unfold p0ProjectionResidualSq2 constApproxError2
nlinarith

unfold p0Projection2Left p0Projection2Right
exact cellAverage2_const (cellAverage2 u0 u1)

unfold weightedP0Average
have h : (∑ i ∈ s, m i * (c * u i)) = c * (∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) := by
  calc
    (∑ i ∈ s, m i * (c * u i)) = (∑ i ∈ s, c * (m i * u i)) := by
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i _ => ?_
      ring
    _ = c * (∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) := by rw [Finset.mul_sum]
rw [h, mul_div_assoc]

calc
    (∑ i ∈ s, m i * weightedP0Residual s m u i) = (∑ i ∈ s, m i * (u i - weightedP0Average s m u)) := by
      rw [weightedP0Residual]
    _ = (∑ i ∈ s, (m i * u i - m i * weightedP0Average s m u)) := by
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i hi => ?_)
      ring
    _ = (∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) - (∑ i ∈ s, m i * weightedP0Average s m u) := by rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
    _ = (∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) - (∑ i ∈ s, m i) * weightedP0Average s m u := by rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
    _ = (∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) - ((∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) / (∑ i ∈ s, m i)) * (∑ i ∈ s, m i) := by rw [weightedP0Average]
    _ = 0 := by
      field_simp [hmass]
      ring

have ⟨hwL, hwR⟩ := laxFriedrichsWeights_nonneg cfl hcflLower hcflUpper
have hsum := laxFriedrichsWeights_sum cfl
calc
  |laxFriedrichsStep cfl uLeft uRight| = |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| := rfl
  _ ≤ |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft| + |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| := abs_add _ _
  _ = |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl| * |uLeft| + |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl| * |uRight| := by simp [abs_mul]
  _ = laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * |uLeft| + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * |uRight| := by simp [abs_of_nonneg hwL, abs_of_nonneg hwR]
  _ ≤ laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * M + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * M := by
    apply add_le_add
    · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hLeft hwL
    · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hRight hwR
  _ = (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl) * M := by ring
  _ = 1 * M := by rw [hsum]
  _ = M := by simp

unfold heatLeftWeight heatCenterWeight heatRightWeight
constructor
· exact hr0
· constructor
· linarith
· exact hr0
simpa [kdvCanonicalFlux_const c] using fluxDifference_const_zero (3 * c ^ 2) i

unfold vec2InfNorm diag2First diag2Second
have h1 : |a * x| = |a| * |x| := abs_mul a x
have h2 : |b * y| = |b| * |y| := abs_mul b y
rw [h1, h2]
apply max_le
· have ha_mul : |a| * |x| ≤ rho * |x| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ha (abs_nonneg x)
have hx_max : |x| ≤ max |x| |y| := le_max_left _ _
have h_mul2 : rho * |x| ≤ rho * max |x| |y| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hx_max hrho
exact le_trans ha_mul h_mul2
· have hb_mul : |b| * |y| ≤ rho * |y| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hb (abs_nonneg y)
have hy_max : |y| ≤ max |x| |y| := le_max_right _ _
have h_mul2 : rho * |y| ≤ rho * max |x| |y| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hy_max hrho
exact le_trans hb_mul h_mul2

unfold finiteRowApply
rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
rw [hsum]
simp

unfold finiteDC centeredSignal finiteMean
rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
field_simp [hcard]
ring
